name: Canny
description: Monitor Canny product feedback platform for team access and user feedback data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Canny at https://canny.io
2. Go to Settings → API
3. Copy your API Key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Canny Settings → API → API Key

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Canny admin users with access to product feedback and voting data

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Canny product feedback platform is operational
